testsuite.name: package2.AmazonProject.TC_1_LogintoAmazon

testcase.name: withValidCredentials
testcase.system-out: Hoverover on account and List and Click on sigin is successful UserName and Password has been entered successfully Test Case is Pass as Assertion is also Pass

testsuite.system-out: Hoverover on account and List and Click on sigin is successful UserName and Password has been entered successfully Test Case is Pass as Assertion is also Pass Hoverover on account and List and Click on sigin is successful UserName and Password has been entered and login is successful Hoverover on account and List and Click on signout is successful Test Case is Pass as Assertion is also Pass
